FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f0bee350a90>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-02T18:21:34Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-02T18:19:50Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-02T18:21:34Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-02T18:19:50Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/02 18:23:16.798355831 {

2026/06/02 18:23:16.798369446 new <- list()
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798370268 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798383673 new$width <- width
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798384444 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798398440 new$height <- height
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798399312 if (!missing(onefile))

2026/06/02 18:23:16.798445548 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798446360 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798460326 new$version <- version
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798461127 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798475985 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798476907 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798491193 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798493618 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798507113 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798509767 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798528122 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798529023 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798542408 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798543220 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798557396 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798558188 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798572244 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798572996 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798587222 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798588144 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798634540 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798635782 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798650310 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798652524 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798673333 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798674165 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798689824 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798690675 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798705773 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798706655 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798721262 new$author <- author
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798722054 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798741089 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798742252 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/02 18:23:16.798778179 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798778980 "default"))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798795751 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798796523 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798812042 }
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798812983 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798827721 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798828522 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798843891 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798844753 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798861053 }
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798861955 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798875370 }
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798876201 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798889526 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798890398 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798905536 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798906318 domain = NA)
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798922778 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798923670 }
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798935271 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798938237 old$family <- family
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798959386 }

2026/06/02 18:23:16.798974995 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/02 18:23:16.798975957 "2.0")

2026/06/02 18:23:16.799009900 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799010892 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799026912 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799027813 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799043673 domain = NA)
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799044424 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799057729 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799058421 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799071756 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799083648 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799084499 old$author)
2026/06/02 18:23:16.799100780 invisible()
